creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
On Tue, 27 May 2014 15:50:04 UT Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
>
> Maintainer of www/phpgedview,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/190316 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/190316
> 


Some time back I submitted PR 189628:
    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/189628
which would move this port to the attic and/or delete the port.

Phpgedview has not been maintained upstream for over 5 years, now.
It is effectively deprecated in favor of www/webtrees.

Joseph, if you would like to take over maintainership of this port
please also add your name to the MAINTAINER field along with this
staging support.  If not, my suggestion is that this port be deleted
instead of having staging added.

	-jr
